tool.name: Check Identity Gate
tool.description: Compare constraint sets from System A and B to determine structural correspondence (Phase 3). Returns IDENTICAL, SIMILAR, or DIVERGENT verdict.

scope.description: The aspect or domain being compared

matched_pairs.description: Pairs of constraints that correspond between systems

verdict.description: Overall verdict: identical, similar, or divergent

unmatched_a.description: Constraint IDs from A with no match in B

unmatched_b.description: Constraint IDs from B with no match in A

ai.systemPromptSection:
### check_identity_gate
Compare constraint sets to determine structural correspondence. This is Phase 3 of the Collapse Engine workflow.

usageExamples.input: {"session_id": "sess-123", "scope": "dynamics", "matched_pairs": [{"constraint_a_id": "ca-1", "constraint_b_id": "cb-1", "match_type": "isomorphic", "justification": "Both express gradient descent on energy landscape"}], "verdict": "similar", "unmatched_a": ["ca-3"], "notes": "Strong correspondence in optimization dynamics"}

whenToUse: After extracting constraints from both systems
Determining if analogy passes identity gate
